Welcome Module

          

            

              

                
Welcome Messages

                Disabled
              

              
Send a templated greeting when a member joins. Supports {user} and {server}.

              

                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Goodbye Module

          

            

              

                
Goodbye Messages

                Disabled
              

              
Send a templated message when a member leaves. Supports {user} and {server}.

              

                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Audit Log Module

          

            

              

                
Audit Log Stream

                Disabled
              

              
Stream selected moderation/server events to one channel.

              

                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Immutable Audit Trail

Type

              
Message

              
Hash

            

            

          

        

      


      

        

          
Invite Tracker Module

          

            

              

                
Invite Tracker

                Disabled
              

              
Tracks new joins and attempts to attribute the invite code/inviter.

              
Checking bot permission requirements...

              

                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
AutoMod Module

          

            

              

                
AutoMod

                Disabled
              

              
Automatic filtering for links, blocked words, and repeated-message spam.

              

                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Reaction Roles Module

          

            

              

                
Reaction Roles

                Disabled
              

              
Assign roles when members react to a configured message emoji.

              

                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Rules

Warnings Module

          

            

              

                
Warnings

                Disabled
              

              
Issue manual warnings and auto-escalate to quarantine/kick at thresholds.

              

                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Issue Warning

Scheduled Messages Module

          

            

              

                
Scheduled Messages

                Disabled
              

              
Post recurring messages every N minutes in a selected channel.

              

                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Schedules

Verification Module

          

            

              

                
Join Verification

                Disabled
              

              
Assign an unverified role on join and verify members when they type the phrase in verification channel.

              

                
                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Tickets Module

          

            

              

                
Support Tickets

                Disabled
              

              
Users open tickets by sending the open phrase in the inbox channel. Bot creates a private channel under the configured category.

              

                
                
                
                
                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Tickets

          

            
            
          

          

            

              
ID

              
Creator

              
Channel

Created

Anti-Raid Module

          

            

              

                
Anti-Raid

                Disabled
              

              
Detect join spikes and apply temporary protection policies.

              

                
                
                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Analytics Module

          

            

              

                
Analytics Reports

                Disabled

Trends

Warnings

Tickets

            

            

          

        

      


      

        

          
Starboard Module

          

            

              

                
Starboard

                Disabled
              

              
When a message gets enough stars, repost it into the starboard channel.

              

                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Leveling Module

          

            

              

                
Leveling

                Disabled
              

              
Grant XP for chat activity and optionally announce level-ups in one channel.

Giveaways

Suggestions

                Disabled

Keyword Alerts Module

          

            

              

                
Keyword Alerts

                Disabled
              

              
Watch for configured keywords and post an alert with jump link to the alert channel.

              

                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
AFK Module

          

            

              

                
AFK Status

                Disabled
              

              
Users can set AFK using a phrase. Mentions of AFK users notify the channel.

              

                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Reminders Module

          

            

              

                
Reminders

                Disabled
              

              
Queue one-time reminders to send at a specific time.

Account Age Guard Module

          

            

              

                
Account Age Guard

                Disabled
              

              
On new joins, enforce a minimum Discord account age with optional quarantine/kick.

              

                
                
                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        

          
Member Notes Module

          

            

              

                
Member Notes

                Disabled
              

              
Store moderator notes per member and resolve them when no longer relevant.

              

                
                
              

            

          

          

            
            
          

        

        

          
Notes
